verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here I am, I've come to find You Here I am, to see Your grace To bring to You an offering, I have to ask myself one thing How can I do anything but praise, I praise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You, You are God, You are Lord You are all I'm living for You are King of everything I want my life to praise You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here I am, I've come to thank You Here I am, a life You've changed Because You gave Your life for me, You crucified Your Son for me Now how can I do anything but praise, I praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are God, You are Lord You are all I'm living for You are King of everything I want my life to praise You
